records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,

records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, my brother! You were looking for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, my brother! You were looking for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, my brother! You were looking for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why am I calling you that...? Are you uncomfortable being called that in a private room by a girl like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why am I calling you that...? Are you uncomfortable being called that in a private room by a girl like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why am I calling you that...? Are you uncomfortable being called that in a private room by a girl like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. To be honest, I thought you smelled just like my older brother from the moment we first met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. To be honest, I thought you smelled just like my older brother from the moment we first met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. To be honest, I thought you smelled just like my older brother from the moment we first met.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
He cared for me and loved me so much. So, I liked him too
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
He cared for me and loved me so much. So, I liked him too
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
He cared for me and loved me so much. So, I liked him too
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after all the other subjects failed the synthesis experiment and died, I was the only one left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after all the other subjects failed the synthesis experiment and died, I was the only one left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after all the other subjects failed the synthesis experiment and died, I was the only one left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...! People normally look at me with pity in their eyes when they hear this story. But you didn't even flinch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...! People normally look at me with pity in their eyes when they hear this story. But you didn't even flinch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...! People normally look at me with pity in their eyes when they hear this story. But you didn't even flinch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even that's so similar to my older brother!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even that's so similar to my older brother!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even that's so similar to my older brother!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, I killed my brother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, I killed my brother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I killed my brother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In front of all the researchers. Because only the last one standing could avoid being discarded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In front of all the researchers. Because only the last one standing could avoid being discarded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In front of all the researchers. Because only the last one standing could avoid being discarded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So when my hands were covered in his blood,
records.m_Talk_DEU: So when my hands were covered in his blood,
records.m_Talk_FRA: So when my hands were covered in his blood,

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought, if I die... I'd like to die in the hands of someone who most resembles my older brother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought, if I die... I'd like to die in the hands of someone who most resembles my older brother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought, if I die... I'd like to die in the hands of someone who most resembles my older brother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, so don't feel so pressured to assign me to a mission that might kill me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, so don't feel so pressured to assign me to a mission that might kill me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, so don't feel so pressured to assign me to a mission that might kill me.
